title: Beta (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Beta Squadron}}
'''Beta''' could refer to:

==Canon==

* [[Beta (security level)]]
* [[Beta 3]]
* [[Beta-class shuttle]]
* [[Beta Trawler]]
* [[Gesaral Beta|Gaseral Beta]]
* [[Sebris Beta]]
* [[Squad Beta]]

==Legends==
*A letter of the [[Tionese/Legends|Tionese alphabet]].
*[[Beta-class ETR-3 escort transport|''Beta''-class ETR-3 escort transport]].
*[[Beta-class assault shuttle|''Beta''-class assault shuttle]].
* [[Beta Cruiser]].
*[[Junior Lieutenant/Legends|Junior Lieutenant]] [[Beta Ioli]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]].
* The [[Beta Sector]].
*The [[Beta system]].
*The star [[Goroth Beta]].
*The planet [[Beta Olikark]].
*The planet [[Beta Rhama]].
*The planet [[Hyrol Preen Beta]].
* [[Ice Station Beta/Legends|Ice Station Beta]], a [[Phrik/Legends|phrik]] refinery on [[Anteevy/Legends|Anteevy]].
*[[Outpost Beta/Legends|Outpost Beta]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sentry station on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].
*[[Beta-4 CardShark]], a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]]-dealing [[Droid/Legends|droid]].
*[[Beta Fleet]], an [[Imperial Remnant]] fleet commanded by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]].
*[[Beta Omega]], a Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].
*[[Attack Formation Beta-Zero]], a [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]] combat tactic.
*[[Attack Pattern Beta]], a combat tactic used by Rebel [[Snowspeeder/Legends|snowspeeders]].
*[[Design Team Beta]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] design team for secret projects.
*[[Beta Squad]], a unit of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]].
*Beta, the mate of a [[gra]] dominant male (Alpha), and second dominant in a herd.
*[[Battle Droid Beta Version]]
*[[B2-series super battle droid|Super Battle Droid Beta Version]]
